description: Style NoteThis lotto shoe is the perfect response to Indian weather - lightweight and easy on the pocket! This shoe offers a comfy ride and is perfect for fun fridays at work. You can also use this shoe for an early morning jog in the park.Product DetailsRound toed white shoe with synthetic overlays, perforations at the forefoot and midfoot and central lace-upsPadded tongue and innerRubber midsoleTPU outsole with herringbone groovesMaterial and CareSyntheticWipe with clean dry cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
